* Keith bought 8 new baseball trading cards to add to his collection.  
* His dog ate half of his collection.  
* There are now only 46 cards left.  
* The total number of cards before the dog ate any was double the number left.  
* The number of cards left after the dog ate is 46.  
* The number of cards before the dog ate was 46 × 2 = 92.  
* Keith started with 92 cards.  
* The number of cards eaten by the dog is 92 - 46 = 46.  
* The final answer is 92.
